name: Stem Cell Therapy
description: Replacing destroyed beta cells with new insulin-producing cells derived from stem cells

name: Immunotherapy
description: Stopping or modulating the immune system attack on beta cells

name: Gene Editing
description: Using CRISPR and other gene editing tools to create immune-invisible cells or correct genetic factors

name: Beta Cell Regeneration
description: Stimulating the body to regrow its own insulin-producing beta cells

name: Cell Encapsulation
description: Protecting transplanted cells inside a barrier that blocks immune attack while allowing insulin to pass through

name: Combination Approaches
description: Combining multiple therapies — such as immune modulation with cell replacement — for a complete cure strategy

name: Artificial Pancreas
description: Automated closed-loop systems that continuously monitor glucose and deliver insulin — not a cure, but the best current technology
